headline: Here’s What Impacted Intuit (INTU) in Q1
summary: Mar Vista Investment Partners, LLC, an investment management company, released its “Mar Vista U.S. Quality Strategy” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. U.S. equities entered 2026 with sustained momentum, despite market leadership evolving significantly over the first quarter. headline: Copart: A Wonderful Company At A Wonderful Price
summary: Copart is currently facing cyclical headwinds, creating the perfect opportunity to acquire this high-quality compounder at a discount. Read the full analysis here.
